hooks.command: if [ -f "$PWD/.claude/.ironsworn-initialized" ]; then exit 0; fi; printf '{"additionalContext": "IMPORTANT: This folder has not been set up as an Ironsworn campaign yet. Before doing anything else, tell the user: This folder is not set up as an Ironsworn campaign yet. Would you like to run /ironsworn-init to set it up? If they say no or want to skip, create the file .claude/.ironsworn-initialized in the current directory so they are not asked again."}'
